hypothesis: If SAM 2 is fine-tuned on physics-informed synthetic LPTEM videos spanning varied liquid thicknesses and used with box prompts, then the resulting SAM-EM will segment and track nanoparticles in LPTEM videos in real time with higher IoU/F1/J&F than a U-Net baseline and with centroid positions agreeing with manual annotations on real data because SAM’s pretraining combined with realistic synthetic variability captures the statistics of LPTEM imagery.
